name: Stranderäng
description:
Sväng mot Kungshamn/Smögen från väg 162. Efter ca. 4 kilometer vid änden av Åbyfjorden ser man klippan upp på höger sida. Ett stort dieder med en björk markerar andra replängden på leden "Örnen". Parkera på busshållplatsen utan att stå i vägen för bussen.

Turn towards Kungshamn/Smögen off of route 162. After approx. 4 km. at bottom of the Åbyfjorden fjord the cliff is visible on the right hand side of the road. A huge dihedral with a birch tree in it marks the second pitch of the route "Örnen - the eagle". Park at the bus stop and pay attention not to block the stop for the bus.

sections.title: Introduktion
sections.body:
Imponerande klippa vid botten Åbyfjorden tyvärr med få linjer.

An imposing cliff at the end of Åbyfjorden. Unfortunately the cliff holds few lines

sections.title: Karaktär
sections.body:
Klassisk sprick- och face-klättring.

Classic crack- and faceclimbing

Turn towards Kungshamn/Smögen off of route 162. After approx. 4 km. at bottom of the Åbyfjorden fjord the cliff is visible on the right hand side of the road. A huge dihedral with a birch tree in it marks the second pitch of the route "Örnen - the eagle". Park at the bus stop and pay attention not to block the stop for the bus.

description.text: Turn towards Kungshamn/Smögen off road 162. After about 4 km, at the end of the Åbyfjorden fjord, the cliff will be visible on the right side of the road. A large dihedral with a birch tree in it marks the second pitch of the route "Örnen". Park at the bus stop, ensuring not to block access for the bus.

Turn towards Kungshamn/Smögen off of route 162. After approx. 4 km at the bottom of Åbyfjorden, the cliff is visible on the right-hand side of the road. A huge dihedral with a birch tree in it marks the second pitch of the route "Örnen - the eagle". Park at the bus stop and pay attention not to block the stop for the bus.
